title: jasminum calycinum
intro: Jasminum calycinum, also known as star jasmine or night-blooming jasmine, is an evergreen climbing plant native to the Himalayas and Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Jasminum calycinum include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues.
